content.query:
SELECT 
[_id] as AudienceID
,[_account__account_id] as AccountID
,[_name] as AudienceName
,[_targeting__age_min] as TargetingAgeMin
,[_targeting__age_max] as TargetingAgeMax
,[_approximate_count_lower_bound] as ApproximateCountLowerBound
,[_approximate_count_upper_bound] as ApproximateCountUpperBound
,[_run_status] as RunStatus
,[_targeting__targeting_optimization] as TargetingTargetingOptimization
,[_time_created] as TimeCreated
,[_time_updated] as TimeUpdated
,[_permission_for_actions__can_edit] as PermissionForActionsCanEdit
,[_permission_for_actions__can_see_insight] as PermissionForActionsCanSeeInsight
,[_permission_for_actions__can_share] as PermissionForActionsCanShare
,[_permission_for_actions__subtype_supports_lookalike] as PermissionForActionsSubtypeSupportsLookAlike
,[_permission_for_actions__supports_recipient_lookalike] as PermissionForActionsSupportsRecipientLookAlike
,[_sentence_lines] as SentenceLines
,[_targeting__excluded_connections] as TargetingExcludedConnections
,[_targeting__excluded_custom_audiences] as TargetingExcludedCustomAudiences
,[_targeting__excluded_geo_locations__location_types] as TargetingExcludedGeoLocationsLocationTypes
,[_targeting__excluded_geo_locations__regions] as TargetingExcludedGeoLocationsRegions
,[_targeting__exclusions__interests] as TargetingExclusionsInterests
,[_targeting__flexible_spec] as TargetingFlexibleSpec
,[_targeting__genders] as TargetingGenders
,[_targeting__interests] as TargetingInterests
,[_targeting__locales] as TargetingLocales
,[_targeting__geo_locations__countries] as TargetingGeoLocationsCountries
,[_targeting__geo_locations__custom_locations] as TargetingGeoLocationsCustomLocations
,[_targeting__geo_locations__location_types] as TargetingGeoLocationsLocationTypes
 FROM [RIVERY].[fb_ads_saved_audiences]
